dashboard.title: Logs Dashboard
dashboard.selectFileDescription: Select a log file to view statistics and analytics.
dashboard.noDataDescription: No data available yet for analytics.
dashboard.largeFilePreviewNotice: Large file mode: dashboard is based on file preview and can differ from the full-table view.
dashboard.largeFileFullScanNotice: Large file mode: all dashboard charts are calculated from the full file (timeline uses sampled points).
dashboard.noParsedWarning: Dashboard did not parse any lines. Add/update a matching log format to unlock analytics.
